flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rochester Institute of Technology rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($25.0k → $29.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rochester Institute of Technology rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.8k → $59.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rochester Institute of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Rochester Institute of Technology rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (24.8% → 28.2%).
